items.title: Controversial Ferrari Luce EV is an instant sellout in China
items.summary: All the controversy surrounding the launch of the first all-electric sedan to ever wear the Ferrari badge hasn't slowed down sales any - every single Ferrari Luce allocated to the Chinese market is already spoken for.
